user.title: HA GitOps
user.description: Link this Home Assistant configuration directory (/config) to a Git remote using SSH. A deploy key with access to the repository must already exist at the SSH path (or use the default under .ha_gitops/).

data.ssh_key_path: Private SSH key: leave empty for .ha_gitops/id_ed25519 under the config dir, or enter an absolute path, or a path relative to the config directory (e.g. .ha_gitops/id_ed25519)

abort.already_configured: HA GitOps is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

error.git_error: Could not initialize the Git repository. Check the URL, branch, SSH key path, and Home Assistant logs.

data.menu_action: What do you want to do?

settings.title: Git connection and polling
settings.description: Submit runs GitManager.initialize() against /config, saves settings, and reloads the integration.

data.ssh_key_path: Private SSH key: leave empty for .ha_gitops/id_ed25519 under the config dir, or enter an absolute path, or a path relative to the config directory (e.g. .ha_gitops/id_ed25519)
data.auto_reload_after_pull: Automatically reload core configuration after a pull that changes YAML (skips Repairs / manual reload link for that pull)

generate_key.title: Generate ED25519 SSH key
generate_key.description: Creates a new key pair at the path below. Fails if a non-empty private key already exists. After success you get a persistent notification with the public key and the integration reloads.

data.ssh_key_path: Private key path (same rules as setup; empty = default under .ha_gitops/)

error.git_error: Could not initialize the Git repository. Check the URL, branch, SSH key path, and Home Assistant logs.
error.ssh_keygen_failed: Could not generate the SSH key. See Home Assistant logs.

abort.ssh_key_generated: SSH key created. Open notifications to copy the public key. The integration was reloaded.

commit.name: Commit
commit.description: Stage allowed YAML and .gitignore, then create a local commit without pushing.

message.name: Commit message
message.description: Optional full git commit message. Leave empty to use the adaptive HA GitOps template from changed files.

pulled_config_reload.title: HA GitOps: configuration updated from Git
pulled_config_reload.description:
A pull merged {count} changed file(s) into `/config`. Reload core configuration so YAML changes take effect.

Changed: {files}

confirm.title: Reload core configuration?
confirm.description: This runs the **homeassistant.reload_core_config** service (same as Developer tools → YAML → Reload configuration). Submit to apply and close this repair.
